test_output_summary: 73 tests passed in 0.17s across 4 test files. All tests for TASK-OEX-004 acceptance criteria pass. (1 pre-existing failure in tests/test_prompts.py from TASK-OEX-003 is unrelated.)
implementation_notes: Created four configuration and domain structure files: (1) orchestrator-config.yaml with orchestrator section (reasoning_model, implementation_model, checkpoint_level) and project section (name, description), using provider:model format compatible with init_chat_model(); (2) AGENTS.md defining ALWAYS/NEVER/ASK behavioral boundaries for Orchestrator, Implementer, and Evaluator roles; (3) domains/example-domain/DOMAIN.md with domain-specific guidelines and evaluation criteria; (4) skills/example-skill/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter metadata and markdown documentation body. All files follow the patterns specified in the task description and reference materials.
requirements_addressed: AC-001: orchestrator-config.yaml exists with required sections
AC-005: project section with name and description
AC-006: AGENTS.md defines ALWAYS/NEVER/ASK for all three roles
AC-010: domains/example-domain/DOMAIN.md with guidelines and evaluation criteria
AC-012: Model values use provider:model format compatible with init_chat_model()

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `orchestrator-config.yaml` contains: orchestrator section with reasoning_model, implementation_model, checkpoint_level, and project section with name and description
completion_promises.evidence: Created orchestrator-config.yaml with 'orchestrator' top-level key containing reasoning_model, implementation_model, and checkpoint_level, plus 'project' top-level key containing name and description. Validated by TestConfigFileExists tests (test_config_has_orchestrator_section, test_config_has_project_section).

Set reasoning_model to 'anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6'. Validated by TestReasoningModel tests: exists, is string, matches provider:model regex pattern, has exactly one colon separator with non-empty provider and model parts.

Set implementation_model to 'anthropic:claude-haiku-4-5'. Validated by TestImplementationModel tests: exists, is string, matches provider:model regex pattern, has exactly one colon separator with non-empty provider and model parts.
Set checkpoint_level to 'standard'. Validated by TestCheckpointLevel tests: exists, is string, not empty, is a valid option from {minimal, standard, verbose}.
Created project section with name='deepagents-orchestrator-exemplar' and a descriptive description string. Validated by TestProjectSection tests: name/description exist, are strings, are non-empty.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `AGENTS.md` defines ALWAYS/NEVER/ASK boundaries for: Orchestrator, Implementer, Evaluator
completion_promises.evidence: Created AGENTS.md with ## Orchestrator, ## Implementer, ## Evaluator sections, each containing ### ALWAYS, ### NEVER, ### ASK subsections. Validated by TestAgentsMdExists tests: all three role sections exist, all three have ALWAYS/NEVER/ASK subsections.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Orchestrator: ALWAYS reason before acting, NEVER implement directly, ASK when plan is ambiguous
completion_promises.evidence: Orchestrator ALWAYS section includes 'Reason before acting' as first bullet. NEVER section includes 'Implement directly' as first bullet. ASK section includes 'When the plan is ambiguous' as first bullet. Each validated by regex-based tests in TestOrchestratorBoundaries.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Implementer: ALWAYS follow the plan, NEVER evaluate own work, ASK when instructions unclear
completion_promises.evidence: Implementer ALWAYS section includes 'Follow the plan' as first bullet. NEVER section includes 'Evaluate own work' as first bullet. ASK section includes 'When instructions are unclear' as first bullet. Each validated by regex-based tests in TestImplementerBoundaries.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Evaluator: ALWAYS use structured verdict schema, NEVER have tools, ASK when criteria ambiguous
completion_promises.evidence: Evaluator ALWAYS section includes 'Use the structured verdict schema' with a JSON example containing verdict, criterion_id, evidence, and suggestions fields. NEVER section includes 'Have tools' as first bullet. ASK section includes 'When criteria are ambiguous' as first bullet. Validated by TestEvaluatorBoundaries tests including verdict schema field checks.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `domains/example-domain/DOMAIN.md` contains example domain-specific guidelines and evaluation criteria
completion_promises.evidence: Created domains/example-domain/DOMAIN.md with: Overview section, Domain Guidelines section (Code Quality Standards, File Organization, Naming Conventions, Error Handling), and Evaluation Criteria section (Functional, Structural, and Style criteria with numbered items). Validated by TestDomainGuidelines and TestDomainEvaluationCriteria test classes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `skills/example-skill/SKILL.md` contains example skill documentation with YAML frontmatter
completion_promises.evidence: Created skills/example-skill/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter containing name, version, description, author, tags, dependencies, inputs (with name/type/required/description), and outputs (with name/type/description). Markdown body includes Skill title, Purpose, Description, Usage, and Examples sections. Validated by TestSkillFrontmatter (9 tests) and TestSkillBody (5 tests).

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] Model values in config use `"provider:model"` format compatible with `init_chat_model()`
completion_promises.evidence: Both reasoning_model ('anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6') and implementation_model ('anthropic:claude-haiku-4-5') use provider:model format. Validated by TestInitChatModelCompatibility: models can be split into provider/model parts, providers are valid identifiers, and providers are from known LLM provider list (anthropic is in the set).
